daily.today_energy: The scales are tilting toward clarity. You're radiating that balanced energy people gravitate toward—use it to set boundaries that actually stick. Today's about knowing your worth without needing to announce it.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, there's a sweetness in just existing together without forced convos. Single? Someone's noticing your vibe from across the room. Either way, authenticity is your love language rn.
daily.career: Your collaborative spirit is peaking. This is the moment to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or reach out to someone you've been meaning to connect with. The universe is backing your visibility play.
daily.health: Your nervous system's asking for something grounding today—could be a walk, tea, or just unplugging from the noise for an hour. Trust what your body's telling you; it knows what it needs.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about reclaiming your space, Libra. The cosmos is nudging you toward authenticity over people-pleasing. Trust the subtle shifts happening behind the scenes—they're setting up something good.
weekly.love: Vulnerability is your superpower right now. Whether you're single or coupled up, showing your real self (messy parts included) creates real connections. Someone's noticing your energy shift.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. Don't sleep on that creative spark—jot it down, sketch it out, share it. Your unique perspective is exactly what's needed. The recognition might surprise you.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness over intensity. Think nourishing moves that feel good rather than punishing ones. Rest isn't laziness; it's you honoring what you actually need right now.
